tweets.text:
I've never met a founder doing $500K+/month who works less than they did at $50K/month.

The dream isn't less work.

The dream is work that doesn't feel like work.

Bezos won't fix Amazon's counterfeit problem bc the company makes money whether the listing is real or fake.

They have zero financial incentive to do anything.

Don't wait for the platform to save u.

That's not their job. It's ours.

"@channel" is where tasks go to die.

50 people see it. 50 people assume someone else is handling it.
Nobody handles it.

We run 40+ people across 4 time zones. If I'm not ruthlessly specific, nothing moves.

Every ask needs 3 things:

1. Who: 1 name. Not "the marketing team." 1

tweets.text: Using Wispr Flow when working in Claude Code is a productivity superpower. It is difficult at first to overcome the strangeness of the behavioral change because we are all so used to typing, but so worth it!

Always thought it was weird of Shopify to not allow certain types of businesses to receive milestone awards, yet allow them to sell on Shopify and make money from them.

One of our businesses sells political and patriotic products and has done 936,632 orders on Shopify, but sadly

If you care more about your marketing team creating on brand assets over making you money you’re an idiot. 

I can’t tell you how many SMBs we speak with who are perfectionists when it comes to their creative, landers, etc. 

Then they wonder why their ads aren’t performing.
